_doc.purpose: Book NSpace mapping table — IRS form fid → Income-Statement Acct UAS path.
_doc.format: [ 'F###', '<Acct UAS>' ]   3-digit zero-padded fid; UAS is either a single COA acct (e.g. 'Acct.Rev.Rent') or a stmtIncomeStmt taxAggregate name prefixed 'IS.' (e.g. 'IS.net_income').
_doc.scope: Only fields that are sourced from the Income Statement appear here.  Profile-sourced and Balance-Sheet-sourced fields live in bookNS_Profile.json / bookNS_BS.json.  A single Acct may appear under multiple fids (e.g. Acct.Rev.Rent → F030,F032,F034,F230).
_doc.resolver: irsForm.savePDF() resolves each entry as follows:  acct startswith 'Acct.' → stmtIncomeStmt row Balance for that COA acct;  acct startswith 'IS.'   → stmtIncomeStmt.taxAggregates()[name];  acct startswith 'Profile.' → stmtProfile cell;  acct startswith 'BS.'   → stmtBalanceSheet.taxAggregates()[name].
_doc.perPartner: Sch_K1 entries are partnership-level totals.  irsForm.savePDF() multiplies them by partner.pct from llcOwners when emitting per-partner FILL pdfs.
